title: Arab leaders join G7 meetings on Trump’s tentative Iran deal, Ukraine war

snapshot.title: Arab leaders join G7 meetings on Trump’s tentative Iran deal, Ukraine war
snapshot.description: DUBAI: Arab heads of states joined a meeting of G7 leaders in France with a packed agenda on their first full day, including challenging discussions on the Middle East conflict and ending Russia’s war in Ukraine. Egyptian President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi, Emir of Qatar Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al-Thani and UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al-Nahyan had arrived in the French
snapshot.author: APArab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Arab leaders join G7 meetings on Trump’s tentative Iran deal, Ukraine war | Arab News
